## Description

<!-- What does this PR do? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat: new feature
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] docs: documentation
- [ ] refactor: code change with no behavior change
- [ ] style: formatting only
- [ ] test: adding/fixing tests
- [ ] chore: build, CI, tooling

## How has this been tested?

- [ ] Ran `python -m py_compile hermesclaw/*.py main.py`
- [ ] Template renders with mock data
- [ ] Docker compose builds + starts
- [ ] Dashboard accessible at `:8010`

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guide (PEP 8, 120-char lines)
- [ ] I have added/updated docs where needed
- [ ] The PR title follows Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, etc.)
- [ ] This is ready for review
